headline: Contempt of court charges silence 9 government critics
context: Nine individuals were charged with contempt of court in 2024 for publicly commenting on ongoing legal proceedings involving government officials.

cards.big: 9 individuals charged with contempt of court for public commentary in 2024
cards.sub: Critics argue contempt powers used to suppress legitimate public interest speech

cards.big: Courts of Judicature Act 1964 Section 13 grants inherent contempt powers
cards.sub: No clear statutory definition of what constitutes contempt by publication

cards.big: Article 10 free speech protections subject to parliamentary restriction
cards.sub: Balance between sub judice rule and public interest remains undefined

cards.big: 7 of 9 charged were online commentators discussing high-profile corruption trials
cards.sub: Pattern suggests contempt charges correlate with politically sensitive cases

cards.big: When courts silence commentary on public interest cases, transparency suffers
Malaysian Bar called for statutory reform of contempt laws with clearer boundaries
